description: NinjaTrader 8 is open. Your goal is to create and save three specific custom drawing tool templates on an AAPL chart to speed up chart markup. Create a 'SupplyZone' Rectangle template with a red outline, red area brush, and approximately 20% area opacity. Create a 'DemandZone' Rectangle template with a green outline, green area brush, and approximately 20% area opacity. Create a 'BigNote' Text template with a blue color, font size 20, and bold formatting. Ensure all templates are saved under their respective names to persist in the application.
